parameters.query: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM form_submissions WHERE contact_phone = $1 AND form_type = $2 AND submitted_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND status IN ('pending','kommo_ok','done')) AS is_duplicate;
INSERT INTO form_submissions (form_type, envelope, contact_phone, contact_email, status, utm, ip, user_agent) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3, $4, 'duplicate_skipped', $5::jsonb, $6, $7);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.formType }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.envelope_json }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.phone_norm }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.email }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.utm_json }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.ip }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.user_agent }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO form_submissions (form_type, envelope, contact_phone, contact_email, status, utm, ip, user_agent) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3, $4, 'pending', $5::jsonb, $6, $7) RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.formType }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.envelope_json }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.phone_norm }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.email }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.utm_json }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.ip }},={{ $('Map and Build').item.json.user_agent }}

parameters.query: UPDATE form_submissions SET status='kommo_ok', kommo_lead_id=$1, kommo_contact_id=$2 WHERE id=$3;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ bot_id: $('Map and Build').item.json.salesbot_id, entity_id: $('Kommo /leads/complex').item.json.id, entity_type: 2 }]) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE form_submissions SET status='done' WHERE id=$1;
UPDATE form_submissions SET status='kommo_failed', error=$2 WHERE id=$1;

parameters.jsCode:
function buildEmail(p) { const accent = p.accent || '#1F9D6E'; const accentDark = p.accentDark || '#0F4A38'; const accentLight = p.accentLight || '#EBF5F0'; const accentBorder = p.accentBorder || '#C8E0D4'; const headerTagBg = p.headerTagBg || '#0A1512'; const headerTagFg = p.headerTagFg || '#1F9D6E'; const heroBg = p.heroBg || '#0F1715'; const headerImg = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentesIAMadrid/email-assets/main/Simarro_header.png'; const logoImg = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentesIAMadrid/email-assets/main/logo_simarro_properties.png'; const dataRows = (p.dataBlocks || []).map((b, i) => ` 0?`style="border-top:1px solid ${accentBorder};"`:''}>

${b.label}

${b.value}

`).join(''); const propertyBlock = p.property ? `
${p.property.thumbnail ? `
` : ''}

Propiedad

${p.property.direccion || ''}

` : ''; const bottomBlock = p.bottom ? `

${p.bottom.label}

${p.bottom.text}

` : ''; const ctaBlock = p.ctaTel ? `

${p.ctaLabel || 'Contactar · ' + p.ctaTel}

` : ''; const quote = p.quote !== null ? `

${p.quote || '“Cada propiedad es una oportunidad,
cada cliente, una historia
que merece la mejor decisión.”'}

` : ''; const footerNote = p.footerNote || 'Este correo se generó automáticamente.'; return ` ${p.subject || 'Simarro Properties'}
${dataRows ? `` : ''} ${propertyBlock} ${bottomBlock} ${ctaBlock} ${quote}
Inmobiliaria & Inversión ${p.kickerTop || ''}
  Inmobiliaria de inversión  

${p.kicker || ''}

${p.headline || ''}

${p.intro || ''}

${dataRows}

Simarro Properties

  ♦  

Inmobiliaria & Inversión

www.simarroproperties.com

${footerNote}

`; } const m = $('Map and Build').item.json; const lid = $('Update kommo_ok')?.first?.()?.json?.kommo_lead_id || $('Map and Build').item.json.kommo_lead_id || ''; const subdom = (m.kommo_subdomain || 'simarro'); const leadUrl = lid ? `https://${subdom}.kommo.com/leads/detail/${lid}` : ''; const html = buildEmail({ subject: `Nuevo lead web — ${m.formType}`, kickerTop: 'Notificación interna', kicker: 'Nuevo lead web', headline: `Hay un lead
esperando.`, intro: `Llegó un nuevo lead desde el formulario ${m.formType || 'web'}. Contáctalo en menos de 24-48h.`, dataBlocks: [ { label: 'Tipo formulario', value: m.formType || '-', big: true }, { label: 'Nombre', value: m.nombre || '-' }, { label: 'Teléfono', value: m.telefono || '-' }, { label: 'Email', value: m.email || '-' }, { label: 'Lead Kommo', value: leadUrl ? `Ver lead en Kommo →` : '(pendiente sync)' } ], bottom: { label: 'Acción', text: 'Abre el lead en Kommo, valida los datos y márcalo como contactado tras la primera llamada/mensaje.' }, ctaTel: null, quote: null, footerNote: 'Notificación automática del formulario web.' }); return [{ json: { html, subject: `Nuevo lead ${m.formType} — ${m.nombre || 'sin nombre'}` } }];

function buildEmail(p) { const accent = p.accent || '#1F9D6E'; const accentDark = p.accentDark || '#0F4A38'; const accentLight = p.accentLight || '#EBF5F0'; const accentBorder = p.accentBorder || '#C8E0D4'; const headerTagBg = p.headerTagBg || '#0A1512'; const headerTagFg = p.headerTagFg || '#1F9D6E'; const heroBg = p.heroBg || '#0F1715'; const headerImg = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentesIAMadrid/email-assets/main/Simarro_header.png'; const logoImg = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AgentesIAMadrid/email-assets/main/logo_simarro_properties.png'; const dataRows = (p.dataBlocks || []).map((b, i) => ` 0?`style="border-top:1px solid ${accentBorder};"`:''}>

${b.label}

${b.value}

`).join(''); const propertyBlock = p.property ? `
${p.property.thumbnail ? `
` : ''}

Propiedad

${p.property.direccion || ''}

` : ''; const bottomBlock = p.bottom ? `

${p.bottom.label}

${p.bottom.text}

` : ''; const ctaBlock = p.ctaTel ? `

${p.ctaLabel || 'Contactar · ' + p.ctaTel}

` : ''; const quote = p.quote !== null ? `

${p.quote || '“Cada propiedad es una oportunidad,
cada cliente, una historia
que merece la mejor decisión.”'}

` : ''; const footerNote = p.footerNote || 'Este correo se generó automáticamente.'; return ` ${p.subject || 'Simarro Properties'}
${dataRows ? `` : ''} ${propertyBlock} ${bottomBlock} ${ctaBlock} ${quote}
Inmobiliaria & Inversión ${p.kickerTop || ''}
  Inmobiliaria de inversión  

${p.kicker || ''}

${p.headline || ''}

${p.intro || ''}

${dataRows}

Simarro Properties

  ♦  

Inmobiliaria & Inversión

www.simarroproperties.com

${footerNote}

`; } const m = $('Map and Build').item.json; const fail = $('Update kommo_failed')?.first?.()?.json || {}; const errMsg = fail.error || m.error || 'Sin detalle. Revisar logs n8n.'; const subId = fail.id || $('Insert pending')?.first?.()?.json?.id || ''; const html = buildEmail({ subject: `URGENTE — Lead web NO entró en Kommo (${m.formType})`, kickerTop: 'Acción urgente', kicker: 'Lead web fallido', headline: `Recupera manualmente
este lead.`, intro: `El formulario ${m.formType || 'web'} no logró crear el lead en Kommo. Hay que recuperarlo desde Postgres.`, dataBlocks: [ { label: 'ID Postgres (form_submissions)', value: String(subId), big: true }, { label: 'Tipo formulario', value: m.formType || '-' }, { label: 'Nombre', value: m.nombre || '-' }, { label: 'Teléfono', value: m.telefono || '-' }, { label: 'Email', value: m.email || '-' }, { label: 'Error', value: `${errMsg}` }, ], bottom: { label: 'Cómo recuperar', text: 'En Postgres tabla form_submissions, status=kommo_failed. Crear lead manualmente en Kommo con los datos de la fila y luego marcar status=done.' }, accent: '#9D1F1F', accentDark: '#7A1A1A', accentLight: '#FBE9E9', accentBorder: '#F1C7C7', headerTagFg: '#FF6B6B', ctaTel: null, quote: null, footerNote: 'Aviso automático de fallo en pipeline web.' }); return [{ json: { html, subject: `⚠ URGENTE — Lead web NO entró en Kommo (${m.formType})` } }];
